data.title: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL)
data.description: Protects user data with encrypted connections.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Monitors and blocks possible attacks on web applications.
data.technical_spec: ModSecurity or other advanced WAF solutions.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Consistent checking of systems for vulnerabilities and compliance.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing, vulnerability scanners (e.g., Nessus, Qualys).

data.title: User Authentication
data.description: Ensures secure user logins with multi-factor authentication.
